title: ListResourcesRequestPayload
description: Request payload for listing xRegistry Resources, optionally filtered by Group type, Group, Resource type, and/or label.

groupType.description: Group type. Lists Resources across all Group types if not specified.

groupId.description: Group identifier. Uses the default Group if not specified. Ignored if allGroups is true.

allGroups.description: If true, lists Resources across all Groups (groupId is ignored). If false or unspecified, lists within the Group specified by groupId, or the default Group if groupId is unspecified.

resourceType.description: Resource type. If specified, only Resources of this type are listed; when listing across all Groups, Resources of this type are matched across all Groups. Lists Resources across all Resource types if not specified.

label.description: If specified, only Resources with this label are listed.
